violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Employee(s) must register and successfully complete an approved course in food safety management. A certified employee must then register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black and brown residues. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine is being cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025

The entrance doors are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025
Gasket of the walk-in cooler is in poor repair and is being held in place with tape. Gasket must be properly repaired/replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

The entrance doors are not tight-fitting. Space observed between the 2 doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024
Door gasket of the walk-in cooler observed in poor repair. Gasket is to be properly repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024
